settings.title: Where Art Meets Thread
settings.description: Premium computerized embroidery on handpicked fabrics. Each piece is a wearable work of art.

settings.title: 1,000 Stitches Per Minute
settings.description: Computerized precision meets artisan design. Experience embroidery like never before.

settings.title: The Art Collection
settings.description: Hand-drawn designs transformed into thread. Only 50 pieces per design.

settings.subtitle: Our Craft
settings.title: Precision in Every Thread
settings.text: We combine cutting-edge computerized embroidery with artisan design sensibility. Each piece undergoes meticulous quality checks to ensure flawless stitching and premium fabric feel.

settings.title: Design
settings.text: Original artwork created by our in-house design team. Every motif is hand-drawn and digitized for perfect stitch translation.

settings.title: Embroider
settings.text: 1,000+ stitches per minute with computerized precision. Multi-head machines ensure consistency across every single piece.

settings.title: Quality Check
settings.text: Thread density, color accuracy, fabric integrity — each piece is inspected before it earns our label.

settings.title: Deliver
settings.text: Carefully packed in premium packaging and shipped to your door. Unwrap your wearable art.

settings.subtitle: Full Range
settings.title: All Products
settings.description: Every piece in our collection — premium embroidery, premium fabric, premium feel.

settings.subtitle: Our Promise
settings.title: Built to Last, Made to Impress
settings.text: Every stitch is a promise of quality. Every garment is made to withstand time while keeping its beauty intact. That's the standard we hold ourselves to.
The embroidery detail is insane. I've never felt this level of quality in a t-shirt before. This isn't fast fashion — it's wearable art.
settings.author: Rahul S.

settings.text: Ordered for my boyfriend and he won't stop wearing it. The stitching holds up wash after wash. We're both addicted now.
settings.author: Priya M.

settings.text: Finally a brand that takes embroidery seriously. The 240GSM cotton, the oversized fit, the attention to detail — perfection.
settings.author: Arjun K.

settings.question: What is computerized embroidery?
settings.answer: Computerized embroidery uses programmable machines to stitch designs onto fabric with extreme precision — 1,000+ stitches per minute. The result is durable, detailed, and consistent artwork.

settings.question: What fabric do you use?
settings.answer: Premium 240GSM 100% combed cotton for tees and 350GSM fleece for hoodies. Pre-shrunk and tested for colorfastness.

settings.question: How should I care for embroidered garments?
settings.answer: Machine wash cold inside-out. Tumble dry low. Do not iron over embroidery. Do not bleach.

settings.question: Do you offer returns?
settings.answer: Yes! Hassle-free returns within 7 days. Free size exchanges if tags are intact.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Standard: 5-7 business days. Express: 2-3 days. Free shipping on orders above ₹999.

settings.question: Are designs limited edition?
settings.answer: Yes — most designs are limited to 50-100 pieces. Follow us on Instagram for drop alerts.

settings.title: Join the Thread
settings.text: Subscribe for early access to new drops, exclusive offers, and behind-the-scenes looks at our embroidery process.
